svg.title: Requirements traceability
svg.desc: Trace from SysML requirements through UAF capabilities, operational activities, services, resources, and verification evidence.

text.tspan: Each installation shall remain organization-owned and shall not depend on a Veoveo
vendor control plane, hosted service, or canonical domain name.
Hosted domains shall use the complete MCP protocol surface where it fits, including
resources, templates, prompts, completions, tasks, subscriptions, notifications,
Every externally reachable MCP or administrative operation shall pass through profile
selection, policy evaluation, and audit at the gateway.
Provider job completion shall be accepted only from a signed provider webhook and shall
Long-running operations shall use one durable task authority with explicit idempotency,
leases, recovery class, cancellation, results, retention, and ordered event delivery.
Artifact occurrences and bytes shall remain tenant-isolated and shall enforce labels,
grants, release state, retention, and bounded sharing.
World and sensor producers shall push Rerun log streams into a private durable recording
Perception shall run locally over authorized recorded data with bounded GPU execution
and shall publish governed derived results.
Autonomous agents shall persist wakes, episodes, task descriptors, retries, results, and
Browser JavaScript shall never receive the gateway bearer and every unsafe console
An offline installation shall verify all transferred files and images and shall not
require network access during loading or operation of provider-independent capabilities.
Compose and Helm shall instantiate the same canonical service graph while retaining
form-specific controls for storage, ingress, network policy, and mTLS.
Analytical users shall retain arbitrary DuckDB SQL within owner-scoped workspaces
bounded by engine, filesystem, process, resource, and network controls.
The platform shall support governed map acquisition, release activation, restrictions,
geodesy, routing, reachable areas, and logistics matrices through stable map identities.
Known platform and domain contracts shall use typed structs, enums, identifiers, and
schemas; raw JSON shall remain confined to genuinely opaque provider boundaries.
cargo test workspace; Python type and test
Only the gateway shall sign short-lived internal identity assertions and hosted services
shall validate the key identifier, audience, tenant, principal, labels, scopes, and
SurrealDB shall remain the sole platform coordination authority; transactional outbox
replay shall remain authoritative over best-effort live delivery.
New hosted servers shall compose through shared contracts and the gateway catalog
without leaking server-specific behavior into generic gateway modules.

svg.text: Veoveo reference baseline - no client-specific data
